narrative:
Precinct Avon City 1-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,278 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
